details: The agent navigated to https://github.com/torvalds/linux and then directly to the Makefile at https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Makefile. It read the actual file content (confirmed by the grep output showing VERSION = 7, PATCHLEVEL = 0, EXTRAVERSION = -rc5 from the saved page snapshot) and correctly reported VERSION = 7 and PATCHLEVEL = 0.
